author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 04 - April/Days 088-094 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Fire Refine Love Stronger Than Fear into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Receive one boundary as mercy today; the Father can bless you while narrowing the road.
edits.reason: Keeps Isaac's blessing-and-charge frame concrete without treating boundaries as rejection.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Come Home to Restoring Compassion into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let the lonely road become a meeting place today; covenant compassion can find you there.
edits.reason: Preserves Jacob's vulnerable road encounter and keeps compassion active before home feels restored.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Practice the Promise That Holds into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Write the truer name today; God's presence can outlast what fear first called that place.
edits.reason: Turns Bethel/Luz renaming into a practical testimony step without pretending the old name vanished.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Trust Love That Sends You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Choose one safe mercy step today; love that sends you does not ask you to pretend.
edits.reason: Keeps forgiveness practical while preserving pastoral safety and truth.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Hope Rise Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Move one clear mercy insight into action today; hope often rises with dust on its feet.
edits.reason: Connects Jacob's listening-and-going response to visible movement without making obedience performative.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Carry the Father's Welcome into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let conviction become clarity today; you can see what must change without surrendering belovedness.
edits.reason: Preserves conviction without shame and keeps the Father's welcome stronger than accusation.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Lean Into Beloved Identity into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Rest this Saturday in God's company; mercy does not have to be carried by your strength.
edits.reason: Preserves seventh-day Sabbath rest and beloved identity as God's nearness on the mercy road.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
